TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Drew_Barry, title = Drew_Barry, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Drew_Barry} }

S.FORM: Drew Barry sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1973, ryax sa tay 17 nqu tay 2, Drew Barry, squliq na p'unro. qnxan nya 1991 kawas, Barrymore ru Leland Hayward's na laqi msqun la.suruw lga ini msqun la. 1992-1993 kawas, hiya ru Jamie Walters msqun la. 1994 kawas 3 byacing 20 ryax, Barrymore ru Jeremy msqun la. suruw sazing byacing lga,Barrymore kmal likong. 1994 kawas,hiya t'aring Eric Erlandson msqun ,suruw lga, MTV ru psibay squilq na msyaq maki 1999 kawas. 2000 kawas hiya ru Green msqun.suruw qutux kawas lga, msqun la. hiya msqun mhtuw Charlie's Angels ru Green's,Green's kmal likong maki 2002 kawas 12 byacing.2002 kawas 10 byacing 15 ryax,wal likong la. 2002 kawas,Barrymore ru Fabrizio Moretti t'aring msqun maki lahuy na hngzyang qwas.2007 kawas 1 byacing masoq ж„ҹжғ…. hiya ru Justin Long msqun,2008 kawas 7 byacing,hiya ini msqun la.suruw lga,hiya msqun loziy ru te sazing ini msqun la. 2011 kawas,Barrymore ru Will Kopelman msqun la.msyahaw qani kmal msqun la ru 2012 kawas 6 byacing 2 ryax,maki Montecito, California msqun la.hiya maki sazing kneril laqi nya,Olive htgan 2012 kawas, Frankie htgan 2014 kawas.2016 kawas 7 byacing 15 ryax, Barrymore kmal likong,2016 kawas 8 byacing 3 ryax,wal likong la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Drew Barry sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1973, ryax sa tay 17 nqu tay 2, Drew Barry, squliq na p'unro. qnxan nya 1991 kawas, Barrymore ru Leland Hayward's na laqi msqun la.suruw lga ini msqun la. 1992-1993 kawas, hiya ru Jamie Walters msqun la. 1994 kawas 3 byacing 20 ryax, Barrymore ru Jeremy msqun la. suruw sazing byacing lga,Barrymore kmal likong. 1994 kawas,hiya t'aring Eric Erlandson msqun ,suruw lga, MTV ru psibay squilq na msyaq maki 1999 kawas. 2000 kawas hiya ru Green msqun.suruw qutux kawas lga, msqun la. hiya msqun mhtuw Charlie's Angels ru Green's,Green's kmal likong maki 2002 kawas 12 byacing.2002 kawas 10 byacing 15 ryax,wal likong la. 2002 kawas,Barrymore ru Fabrizio Moretti t'aring msqun maki lahuy na hngzyang qwas.2007 kawas 1 byacing masoq ж„ҹжғ…. hiya ru Justin Long msqun,2008 kawas 7 byacing,hiya ini msqun la.suruw lga,hiya msqun loziy ru te sazing ini msqun la. 2011 kawas,Barrymore ru Will Kopelman msqun la.msyahaw qani kmal msqun la ru 2012 kawas 6 byacing 2 ryax,maki Montecito, California msqun la.hiya maki sazing kneril laqi nya,Olive htgan 2012 kawas, Frankie htgan 2014 kawas.2016 kawas 7 byacing 15 ryax, Barrymore kmal likong,2016 kawas 8 byacing 3 ryax,wal likong la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Д§ija ms~Й•qun mД§tuw КҰ~КЁД§arlieК”s~Й• aЕӢels~Й• ru ЙЈreenК”s~Й•,ЙЈreenК”s~Й• kmal likoЕӢ maki **** kawas~Й• ** ОІjaКҰ~КЁiЕӢ.**** kawas~Й• ** ОІjaКҰ~КЁiЕӢ ** rjax,wal likoЕӢ la. **** kawas~Й•,ОІarrjmore ru *aОІrizio moretti tК”ariЕӢ ms~Й•qun maki laД§uj na Д§ЕӢzjaЕӢ qwas~Й•.**** kawas~Й• * ОІjaКҰ~КЁiЕӢ mas~Й•oq **. Д§ija ru *us~Й•tin loЕӢ ms~Й•qun,**** kawas~Й• * ОІjaКҰ~КЁiЕӢ,Д§ija ini ms~Й•qun la.s~Й•uruw lЙЈa,Д§ija ms~Й•qun lozij ru te s~Й•aziЕӢ ini ms~Й•qun la. **** kawas~Й•,ОІarrjmore ru will kopelman ms~Й•qun la.ms~Й•jaД§aw qani kmal ms~Й•qun la ru **** kawas~Й• * ОІjaКҰ~КЁiЕӢ * rjax,maki monteКҰ~КЁito, КҰ~КЁali*ornia ms~Й•qun la.Д§ija maki s~Й•aziЕӢ kneril laqi nja,oli*e Д§tЙЈan **** kawas~Й•, *rankie Д§tЙЈan **** kawas~Й•.**** kawas~Й• * ОІjaКҰ~КЁiЕӢ ** rjax, ОІarrjmore kmal likoЕӢ,**** kawas~Й• * ОІjaКҰ~КЁiЕӢ * rjax,wal likoЕӢ la. КҰ~КЁinkД§ulan s~Й•a knitaК” s~Й•a ОІrОІiruК” lis~Й•ts~Й• o* national ОІas~Й•ketОІall as~Й•s~Й•oКҰ~КЁiation plajers~Й•
